title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — GoThru Photo Studio Tauri

issues.display_title: Issue #1: Implement Recursive File Search Across Nested Sub-folders
issues.main_description_html:
Demo by developer

2026-06-26.17-08-46.mp4

Description

Currently, the search bar in the File Manager only performs a shallow search (searching exclusively within the immediate active directory).

Users working with heavily structured directories (e.g. Year > Month > Project ID > Pano > Enfuse) need to search for a specific file name recursively. If a user initiates a search at a high-level parent folder, the app must scan through all sub-folders regardless of depth (e.g. 1-5 levels deep) to locate the file.

Screenshot (user)

  1. "I am in this folder, and there are these sub-folders" (parent with several numbered sub-folders)
  2. "When I search, I want to search throughout all sub-folders and any level of sub-folder, like 1-2-3-4-5 depth" - current result: "No Search Result Found" for a file that exists deeper.
    (Drag-and-drop the annotated screenshot into the issue to embed.)

Context / Reference

Grounded in docs/feedback 05-06-2026/analyze-new.md (#3 File Manager & Preview). The File Manager already uses a real-time filesystem watcher (chokidar); recursive search should reuse main-process FS traversal and run off the UI thread so it doesn't freeze the app (cf. #1435 batch-freeze: heavy FS work must not block the UI).

Investigation directions

  • Make search a recursive directory walk from the active folder in the main process (depth-unbounded, with sane safeguards), streaming matches back to the renderer.
  • Async + responsive: run in the main process and stream/paginate results; don't build one giant in-memory list synchronously. Show progressive results + a loading state.
  • Cancelable + bounded: allow cancel; guard against symlink loops, huge trees, permission errors; skip unreadable dirs gracefully.
  • Consider a recursive toggle (this folder vs all sub-folders) and case-insensitive partial-name matching.

Acceptance Criteria

  1. Searching for a specific file name from a parent directory successfully returns matching files located inside nested sub-folders.
  2. The search handles deep nesting (multiple folder levels) without crashing or timing out.
  3. The main UI remains fully responsive while the deep search is executing.

Testing Scenario (for Tester)

Pre-conditions: Build with the feature - a deeply nested folder tree (e.g. Year > Month > Project > Pano > Enfuse, 4-5 levels) with known files at various depths.

TC1 - Recursive Match (primary)

  1. From a high-level parent folder, search a file name that exists several levels deep.
  2. Expected: The file is found and listed (with its location), not "No Search Result Found".

TC2 - Deep / Large Tree

  1. Search across a very large, deep tree.
  2. Expected: Completes without crash or indefinite hang; results appear (progressively if needed).

TC3 - UI Responsiveness

  1. While a deep search runs, interact with the app (navigate, click controls).
  2. Expected: UI stays responsive; search is cancelable.

TC4 - Edge Cases

  1. Search with no matches; search where some sub-folders are unreadable/permission-restricted.
  2. Expected: Clear "no results" state; restricted folders are skipped gracefully (no crash).

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1: Implement Recursive File Search Across Nested Sub-folders

Suite: qa-testing/automation/e2e/module/file-manager/issue-1-recursive-file-search.spec.ts (installed app + OS fullscreen recording)
Env: Installed GoThru Photo Studio 1.1.2 on Windows - fixture C:\Users\Work\Test GoThru Photo Studio\issue-1-recursive-search

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White file_manager_search_controls parent fixture loaded -> File Manager path/search controls visible TP Pass
2 Gray recursive_nested_match search issue-1-recursive-target.jpg from parent -> nested file is listed, not empty state TP Pass
3 Gray deep_fixture_responsive 5-level fixture search -> app remains open and File Manager responds after search clear TP Pass
4 Black no_match_empty_state search __qa_no_recursive_match_expected__ -> No Search Result Found, no crash TN Pass
5 Task Sprint #1 acceptance parent search -> recursive result -> no-match -> final responsive state TP + TN Pass

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: File Manager parent folder -> search keyword -> recursive local filesystem traversal -> File Manager result list.

Runtime result HTTP status Frontend outcome Review
Recursive match found N/A Nested file appears in result list Verified
Deep fixture search N/A Search completes without visible crash/hang Verified
No matching files N/A No Search Result Found empty state Verified
Restricted/unreadable folder N/A Should skip gracefully Not covered in this run

Bug notes

  • None found for the covered core flow.
  • Full desktop MP4 evidence records the installed app window/navbar and the complete White -> Gray -> Black test sequence.
  • Coverage note: restricted/unreadable folders, symlink loops, and very large real-world stress trees were not covered in this run.
